title: Missing Gifted Children
hook: Missing gifted children, a burned orphanage, and hidden trafficking all point toward a larger buried truth.
playerSummary: Charles is tied to the mystery of missing gifted children and the forces that erased or hid what happened to them.
gmTruth: This is a core Charles thread. Use it for orphanage survivors, trafficking clues, incomplete records, and the slow reveal of how children with unusual gifts were targeted or exploited.
